evidence.check: Corrections/notes coverage: docs explain corrections, notes, and reversal types
evidence.result: AGENTS.md 'What This Module Owns' lists 'Settlements and corrections — notes, reversals, and explicit correction paths'. Posted-Truth Rules section explains JournalCorrectionType.REVERSAL (full or partial) and JournalCorrectionType.VOID (void-only). Source code confirms JournalCorrectionType.java enum with REVERSAL and VOID values. CreditDebitNoteService.java exists for credit/debit note handling.

evidence.check: Corrections/notes coverage: correction/reversal paths are documented
evidence.result: AGENTS.md Posted-Truth Rules section documents reversal via counter-entry (rule 1), reversal types REVERSAL and VOID (rule 2), period-dependent reversal behavior (rules 3-5), period-lock enforcement (rule 6), and compliance audit (rule 7). AccountingCoreEngineCore.java contains createJournalEntryForReversal() method (line 5382).

evidence.check: Posted-truth rules: posted entries are never edited (only reversed)
evidence.result: AGENTS.md Posted-Truth Rule 1: 'Posted entries are never edited — only reversed via a new counter-entry.'

evidence.check: Posted-truth rules: OPEN period entries can be reversed freely
evidence.result: AGENTS.md Posted-Truth Rule 3: 'OPEN period — entries can be reversed freely.'

evidence.check: Posted-truth rules: LOCKED period entries cannot be reversed
evidence.result: AGENTS.md Posted-Truth Rule 4: 'LOCKED period — entries cannot be reversed; the period must be unlocked first.'

evidence.check: Posted-truth rules: CLOSED period reversal requires admin override
evidence.result: AGENTS.md Posted-Truth Rule 5: 'CLOSED period — reversal requires admin override authority with audit approval (overrideAuthorized = true).'

AGENTS.md Posted-Truth Rule 6: 'Period-lock enforcement — controlled by systemSettingsService.isPeriodLockEnforced(). When enforced, the reversal must land in a postable period validated by accountingPeriodService.requirePostablePeriod().'

evidence.check: Posted-truth rules: compliance audit of reversals documented
evidence.result: AGENTS.md Posted-Truth Rule 7: 'Compliance audit — all reversals are recorded via AccountingComplianceAuditService including admin-override metadata.' Source code confirms AccountingComplianceAuditService.java exists and AccountingCoreEngineCore calls accountingComplianceAuditService.recordJournalCreation().

evidence.check: Freshness marker: accounting docs carry valid Last reviewed date
evidence.result: accounting/AGENTS.md line 3: 'Last reviewed: 2026-03-30' — valid YYYY-MM-DD format, date is current.

evidence.check: Cross-module boundaries: all five boundaries documented
evidence.result: AGENTS.md Cross-Module Boundaries section lists all five: (1) Sales → Accounting: dispatch-linked journals, invoice-linked journals, AR settlements; (2) Purchasing → Accounting: GRN-linked journals, purchase return journals, AP settlements; (3) Factory → Accounting: WIP/consumption journals, packaging material journals; (4) HR → Accounting: payroll posting and payment seams (PayrollPostingService → AccountingFacade); (5) Inventory → Accounting: InventoryMovementEvent → InventoryAccountingEventListener.
